title: elaphoglossum isophyllum
intro: Elaphoglossum isophyllum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the shield fern due to its shield-shaped leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Its leaves and stems have been used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Additionally, Elaphoglossum isophyllum has been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions, promoting healing and skin regeneration.
